title: A Love Story

memes.label: 'Table of Contents'
memes.description: 'Table of Contents'

memes.label: Acmé
memes.description: The female lead of A Love Story, a young Greek woman whose love for Sir Henry Delmé and devotion to him form the emotional center of the novel.

memes.label: The Battle of Thrasymene
memes.description: A historical battle referenced in the novel as part of the Italian landscape's charged history.

memes.label: Emily's Visit to the Chantry
memes.description: Emily Delmé standing before the tomb of Sir Reginald Delmé, a meditation on family, lineage, and mortality.

memes.label: Clarendon Gage
memes.description: A neighboring land proprietor and suitor to Emily Delmé in A Love Story, whose character provides a foil to Sir Henry's more serious temperament.

memes.label: Colonel Vavasour
memes.description: A strict military disciplinarian in A Love Story, whose presence on the terrace and in the regiment provides the novel's most detailed portrait of army life.

memes.label: The Conversation on the Terrace
memes.description: The meeting between Delmé and Colonel Vavasour on the terrace, where military and personal matters intersect.

memes.label: Death
memes.description: The inescapable terminus of life in A Love Story, functioning as both a narrative event and a philosophical horizon against which love and grief are measured.

memes.label: Death of Acmé
memes.description: The most devastating event of the novel, marking the loss that transforms Sir Henry Delmé's emotional world.

memes.label: Death of Sir Henry's Uncle
memes.description: The death that suddenly made Sir Henry Delmé the head of the family and set the novel's events in motion.

memes.label: Delancey
memes.description: Sir Henry Delmé's dear friend in A Love Story, a soldier whose wounding and the subsequent duel form one of the novel's most dramatic episodes.

memes.label: The Delmé Family Gathering
memes.description: A family party of the Delmés before the narrative disperses its members across the Mediterranean.

memes.label: The Delmés' Journey to Italy
memes.description: The journey of the Delmé brothers through Italy, from Rome to Florence by way of Perugia.

memes.label: Despair
memes.description: The darkest emotional register of A Love Story, marking the point where grief exceeds endurance and characters confront the limits of human resilience.

memes.label: Devotion
memes.description: Devotion as a central theme in A Love Story — the steadfast commitment of characters to love, duty, and faith, manifested in both sacred and secular forms.

memes.label: Doctor Pormont
memes.description: A singular medical figure in A Love Story, whose professional detachment and memorable anecdotes reveal the novel's interest in character types beyond the romantic leads.

memes.label: Duty
memes.description: The principle of obligation that guides character conduct in A Love Story, often competing with personal desire and shaping the moral architecture of the narrative.

memes.label: Emily Delmé
memes.description: The youngest of the three Delmé siblings, whose beauty, character, and eventual marriage form an important subplot in A Love Story.

memes.label: Emily Delmé's Wedding
memes.description: The culminating social event of the novel, where both families were present at Emily's wedding to Clarendon.

memes.label: England
memes.description: The home country of the Delmé family in A Love Story, serving as both the narrative's point of origin and the standard against which foreign settings are measured.

memes.label: Family
memes.description: The primary social unit in A Love Story, centered on the Delmé family, whose bonds of blood and obligation structure the novel's emotional architecture.

memes.label: Fate
memes.description: The sense of predetermined destiny that haunts the characters of A Love Story, functioning as both a narrative framing device and a philosophical undercurrent.

memes.label: Fidelity
memes.description: Fidelity as a thematic concept in A Love Story — the quality of faithfulness in love, service, and friendship, tested by separation, illness, and death.

memes.label: Florence
memes.description: A destination on the Italian journey in A Love Story, celebrated in verse and reached by the grand routes from Rome.

memes.label: France
memes.description: A country explored by characters in A Love Story, whose capital Paris represents both cultural sophistication and moral danger.

memes.label: Friendship
memes.description: A foundational social bond in A Love Story, portrayed as the relational context that sustains honor, enables confession, and provides the emotional infrastructure for the novel's community.

memes.label: George Delmé
memes.description: Sir Henry's younger brother, whose tale of passionate love and his own illness provide crucial secondary narrative arcs in A Love Story.

memes.label: George Delmé's Illness
memes.description: The period of George Delmé's grave illness, during which his wan features and the family's response form a central narrative thread.

memes.label: Greece
memes.description: A land of romantic history in A Love Story, associated with Acmé's heritage and the classical ideals of freedom and beauty.

memes.label: Grief
memes.description: The emotional consequence of love and loss in A Love Story, portrayed as a transformative force that deepens character and drives the novel's most powerful passages.

memes.label: Honor
memes.description: A central moral concept in A Love Story, governing character conduct through codes of personal and social integrity, often in tension with love and passion.

memes.label: India
memes.description: A distant imperial destination in A Love Story, representing the far reaches of British colonial service and a source of characters and wealth that enter the novel's social world.

memes.label: Italy
memes.description: The primary foreign setting of A Love Story, through which Sir Henry travels and where many of the novel's most significant emotional events unfold.

memes.label: Julia Vernon
memes.description: A noble young woman in A Love Story, whose image haunts Sir Henry Delmé and whose character represents an alternative romantic possibility.

memes.label: London
memes.description: The English capital in A Love Story, home to institutions and characters on the periphery of the narrative.

memes.label: Love
memes.description: The central thematic concept of A Love Story, manifesting as romantic love, fraternal affection, and devotional passion across multiple character arcs.

memes.label: Madness
memes.description: The extreme edge of emotional experience in A Love Story, where passion, grief, and despair cross the boundary into psychological disintegration.

memes.label: Major Clifford
memes.description: A universally popular military figure in A Love Story, whose presence at the dinner table and career history provide insight into the novel's military social world.

memes.label: Malta
memes.description: A central Mediterranean setting in A Love Story, where the Delmé regiment is stationed and where Sir Henry's relationship with Acmé unfolds.

memes.label: Marriage
memes.description: A central social institution in A Love Story, functioning as both the narrative destination of romantic plots and a source of dramatic tension around questions of propriety and family approval.

memes.label: Mediterranean
memes.description: The Mediterranean Sea and its surrounding region, the principal geographic theatre of the Delmé family's travels and Sir Henry's military service.

memes.label: Melancholy
memes.description: A pervasive emotional atmosphere in A Love Story, serving as both a character trait and a narrative mood that colors the novel's treatment of love and loss.

memes.label: Memory
memes.description: A pervasive thematic concept in A Love Story, functioning as both a narrative device (retrospection, letters) and an emotional force that binds characters to their past.

memes.label: Milan
memes.description: An Italian city in A Love Story, associated with music, opera, and Milanese cultural life.

memes.label: Mr. Belliston Græme
memes.description: A much-talked-of figure in A Love Story, whose villa near Bath and dinners with Sir Henry mark him as part of the novel's extended social network.

memes.label: Mr. Graham
memes.description: A trusted friend and advisor in A Love Story, whose knowledge of George Delmé's illness and role as confidant make him an important supporting figure.

memes.label: Mrs. Glenallan
memes.description: Miss Delmé's worthy aunt and Sir Henry's "love of former days" in A Love Story, a figure whose enduring presence connects the novel's past and present.

memes.label: Mrs. Vernon
memes.description: Mother of Julia Vernon, a widow whose drawing-room and social position connect the Delmé family to the wider world of Leamington society.

memes.label: Naples
memes.description: A key Italian city in A Love Story, where characters arrive by sea and which serves as a gateway to further Italian adventures.

memes.label: Signor Pacini's Fête
memes.description: A grand social event organized by Signor Pacini in the grounds of the Earl, featuring a balloon ascent and marking a pivotal social gathering.

memes.label: Paris
memes.description: The French capital in A Love Story, described as a center of both culture and decadence.

memes.label: Passion
memes.description: The intense, often overwhelming force of strong emotion in A Love Story, portrayed as both a vitalizing power and a potential source of destruction.

memes.label: Pietro Molini
memes.description: A Milanese vetturino (driver) who serves the Delmé party during their Italian travels; celebrated by the narrator for his honesty, simple joys, and unlikely friendship with Thompson.

memes.label: Rome
memes.description: A significant destination in the later sections of A Love Story, representing both the cultural riches of Italy and a site of fateful encounters.

memes.label: Sacrifice
memes.description: The act of giving up something of value for a higher purpose in A Love Story, central to the novel's moral vision of love, duty, and honor.

memes.label: Scotland
memes.description: A location briefly referenced in A Love Story through Mr. Selby's visit and character dialogue.

memes.label: Sicily
memes.description: A Mediterranean island in A Love Story, whose coasts are passed by travelers and whose metropolis hosts key scenes.

memes.label: Sir Henry Delmé
memes.description: The protagonist of A Love Story, a middle-aged English baronet whose journey through love, duty, and grief structures the novel's narrative arc.

memes.label: Sir Henry's Voyage to Malta
memes.description: Sir Henry Delmé's sea voyage from England to Malta, a journey not unpropitious that marks his transition into the novel's central action.

memes.label: Sir Reginald Delmé
memes.description: The ancestral patriarch of the Delmé family, whose tomb and memory haunt the novel's later sections as a symbol of lineage, honor, and mortality.

memes.label: The Balloon Ascent
memes.description: The dramatic ascent of a balloon at Pacini's fête, after which Emily and Clarendon turn away as lovers.

memes.label: The Boar Hunt
memes.description: A hunting expedition enjoyed by characters on the northern coast of Sicily, representing the diversions of Mediterranean life.

memes.label: The Departure
memes.description: The departure of the Delmé family from England, a pivotal narrative event marking the transition from domestic life to Mediterranean exile.

memes.label: The Duel
memes.description: A pivotal confrontation between Delancey and another, resulting in Delancey being wounded and creating lasting repercussions.

memes.label: The Funeral
memes.description: Funeral scenes in A Love Story, including the burial rites, funeral orations, and the emotional aftermath of death, which mark key turning points in the narrative.

memes.label: Thompson
memes.description: Loyal servant to Sir Henry Delmé and George Delmé, whose faithful service spans the novel from England to the Mediterranean and ultimately to the Australian colonies.

memes.label: Thrasymene
memes.description: Lake in central Italy, site of Hannibal's victory over the Romans (217 BC), visited by Sir Henry and George Delmé during their Italian journey.

memes.label: Venice
memes.description: A fabled Italian city in A Love Story, associated with Byron's poetry and the romance of the Grand Tour.

memes.label: The Voyage to India
memes.description: Ocean
